description: The Avare aviation GPS app is open with an active 4-leg flight plan: KOAK (Oakland) -> KSCK (Stockton) -> KMOD (Modesto) -> KFAT (Fresno). Modify this flight plan due to a fuel stop change by removing the 'KSCK' (Stockton Metropolitan) waypoint. The resulting route must be KOAK -> KMOD -> KFAT in that order.
